heading: Governor and Alternate Governor
label: 290k–1 Governor and Alternate Governor
text: The Governor and Alternate Governor of the Bank, appointed under , shall serve as Governor and Alternate Governor, respectively, of the Agency.section 286a of this title
notes: CodificationSection is based on section 404 of title IV of H.R. 3750, One Hundredth Congress, as introduced , and enacted into law by .Dec. 11, 1987Pub. L. 100–202
